welcome_message:
рҹ‘Ӣ Welcome! I'm your TravelBot вңҲпёҸ

I'll help you plan the perfect trip! Just tell me:

рҹ“Қ Where you want to go
рҹ“… How many days
рҹ’° Your budget
рҹ‘Ҙ Number of people

Or send:
1пёҸвғЈ Transport options
2пёҸвғЈ Hotel recommendations
3пёҸвғЈ Day-by-day itinerary
4пёҸвғЈ Budget breakdown
5пёҸвғЈ Weather info
6пёҸвғЈ Local food guide
7пёҸвғЈ Book trip

Type "help" anytime for assistance!
welcome_back:
рҹ‘Ӣ Welcome back!

Ready for your next adventure? рҹҢҚ

Send trip details like:
вҖў "Goa 3 days 10000 2 people"
вҖў "Plan Manali trip for 5 days"

Or choose from menu рҹ‘Ү
menu_text:
рҹ“Ӣ *MENU OPTIONS*

1пёҸвғЈ рҹҡҚ Transport - Get travel options
2пёҸвғЈ рҹҸЁ Hotels - See hotel recommendations
3пёҸвғЈ рҹ“… Itinerary - Day-by-day plan
4пёҸвғЈ рҹ’° Budget - See breakdown
5пёҸвғЈ рҹҢӨ Weather - Check forecast
6пёҸвғЈ рҹҚӣ Food - Local food guide
7пёҸвғЈ рҹҺ« Booking - Book your trip

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹ’Ў Type "reset" to start new trip
рҹ’Ў Type "help" for assistance

Reply with a number (1-7)
ask_destination:
рҹ“Қ *Where do you want to go?*

Popular destinations:
вҖў Goa - Beaches & parties рҹҸ–пёҸ
вҖў Manali - Mountains & adventure рҹҸ”пёҸ
вҖў Kerala - Backwaters & nature рҹҢҙ
вҖў Rajasthan - Culture & history рҹҸ°
вҖў Andaman - Islands & diving рҹӨҝ

Or any city in India!

Example: "Goa"
ask_days:
рҹ“… *How many days is your trip?*

Recommended:
вҖў Weekend getaway: 2-3 days
вҖў Short trip: 4-5 days
вҖў Long vacation: 7-10 days

Example: "3 days"
ask_budget:
рҹ’° *What's your total budget?*

Budget ranges (per person):
вҖў Budget: вӮ№5,000-15,000
вҖў Mid-range: вӮ№15,000-30,000
вҖў Premium: вӮ№30,000-50,000
вҖў Luxury: вӮ№50,000+

You can say:
вҖў "10000" or "10k"
вҖў "Under 15000"
вҖў "Around 20k"

Example: "10000"
ask_people:
рҹ‘Ҙ *How many people are traveling?*

Just enter the number.

Example: "2"
error_message:
вҡ пёҸ Oops! Something went wrong.

Please try again or send "help" for options.
error_invalid_input:
вқҢ I didn't understand "{{input}}"

Try sending:
вҖў "Goa 3 days 10000 2 people"
вҖў "Plan trip to Manali"

Or type "help" for options.
help_text:
рҹ“– *HOW TO USE TRAVELBOT*

*Plan a Trip:*
Send all details in one message:
вҖў "Goa 3 days 10000 2 people"
вҖў "Plan Manali trip for 5 days"
вҖў "I want to visit Kerala"

*Menu Options:*
1пёҸвғЈ Transport options
2пёҸвғЈ Hotels
3пёҸвғЈ Itinerary
4пёҸвғЈ Budget breakdown
5пёҸвғЈ Weather
6пёҸвғЈ Food guide

*Commands:*
вҖў "menu" - Show options
вҖў "reset" - Start new trip
вҖў "help" - This message

*Modify Trip:*
вҖў "Change to 5 days"
вҖў "Make it Manali instead"
вҖў "Budget 15000 please"

Need more help? Just ask! рҹҳҠ
feedback_request:
вӯҗ *How was your experience?*

Rate us 1-5 stars:
вҖў 5 вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ Amazing!
вҖў 4 вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ Good
вҖў 3 вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ Okay
вҖў 2 вӯҗвӯҗ Needs improvement
вҖў 1 вӯҗ Poor

Or just say:
вҖў "Great!"
вҖў "Not helpful"
вҖў "Could be better"

Your feedback helps us improve! рҹҷҸ
goodbye:
рҹ‘Ӣ Happy to help!

Have an amazing trip! вңҲпёҸрҹҢҚ

Send "hi" anytime you need travel assistance.
trip_summary:
вң… *TRIP DETAILS CONFIRMED*

рҹ“Қ Destination: {{destination}}
рҹ“… Duration: {{days}} days
рҹ’° Budget: вӮ№{{budget}}
рҹ‘Ҙ People: {{people}}

What would you like to explore?

1пёҸвғЈ Transport options
2пёҸвғЈ Hotel recommendations
3пёҸвғЈ Day-by-day itinerary
4пёҸвғЈ Budget breakdown
5пёҸвғЈ Weather forecast

Reply with a number or type "help"
rate_limit:
вҸі *Slow down there!*

You're sending messages too quickly. Please wait {{minutes}} minute(s) and try again.

This helps us serve everyone better. Thanks for understanding! рҹҷҸ
